notes: Can also be used reflexively as 'sich überzeugen von' meaning 'to convince oneself of / to verify'. The input 'überzeugt' is the past participle or third-person singular present form.

sentences.german: Er überzeugt seine Kollegen von seiner Idee.
sentences.english: He convinces his colleagues of his idea.

sentences.german: Sie hat ihn schließlich überzeugt, mitzukommen.
sentences.english: She finally convinced him to come along.

sentences.german: Der Anwalt überzeugte das Gericht von der Unschuld seines Mandanten.
sentences.english: The lawyer convinced the court of his client's innocence.
